# Agirunner

Start with [agirunner](https://github.com/agirunner/agirunner) for the
full product, quick start, deployment path, and public documentation.

- Product entry point: [agirunner](https://github.com/agirunner/agirunner)
- Documentation: [docs.agirunner.dev](https://docs.agirunner.dev)
- Platform implementation: [agirunner-platform](https://github.com/agirunner/agirunner-platform)
- Runtime implementation: [agirunner-runtime](https://github.com/agirunner/agirunner-runtime)
- Community catalog: [agirunner-playbooks](https://github.com/agirunner/agirunner-playbooks)

If you landed in one of the implementation repos first, the main place to
start is still [agirunner](https://github.com/agirunner/agirunner).
